name_en: 🆕 【Top Grade Original】M14621 Passport 👏👏 From the 'Flight Mode' collection, the playful 'Couvert Passport' appears. Inspired by his travel collection, it is finished in a retro style. It features Monogram Dunne canvas, first seen on the Louis Vuitton Cruise 2023 collection. Dimensions: 10 x 14 x 2.5 cm
